subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter was received. Though we are weak, yet the grace and bounty of the Blessed Beauty are boundless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مکتوب واصل ما هر چند ضعیفیم ولی فضل و عنایت جمال مبارک بسیار یعنی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
